creator: me@anatoli.ws
text:
Hi,

Just wanted to confirm the fixes will be included in 12.1R-p7 and also would like to ask when it's expected to be released?

There's a mention about these fixes in the the about to be published 2020q2 freebsd-quarterly [1] and it would be great to have the fixes released in p7 before the freebsd-quarterly is published.

Thanks,
Anatoli

[1] https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-quarterly/blob/master/2020q2/bhyve-intel-openbsd.md
